guidance: THERMO WARNING: Efficiency 5.9% (97%+ overhead). Reduce system complexity.
lessons: Paired hazina worktree MUST be created BEFORE first build, not after failure. Consciousness warnings are actionable, not informational. Pattern 73 violated 3x but corrected each time. Review workflow complete: fetch, worktrees, merge, build, analyze, comment, update status. Feature-exists check prevented duplicate Media Library work. Clarity checker blocked 3 unclear tasks.
